message:
refactor(extensions): add dangerous_list(), widen policy cache visibility, formatting

- Capability::dangerous_list() returns &[Exec, Env] as a const helper
- cached_policy_prompt_decision() and cache_policy_prompt_decision()
  promoted from private to pub for test access
- Formatting consolidation: collapse multi-line assert_eq! calls and
  chained method calls to single lines where they fit
- Config::merge() promoted to pub for external test usage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
